name: Capital One Savor Cash Rewards Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: Limited-time offer: Earn a one-time $250 cash bonus once you spend $500 on purchases within the first 3 months from account opening.
notes: Official Capital One Savor product page shows this as a public limited-time offer.
No explicit offer end date was visible on the official page at verification time.
This is Capital One Savor, not the separate SavorOne card.

earning_rates.notes: Hotels and rental cars booked through Capital One Travel
Unlimited cash back at grocery stores; excludes superstores like Walmart and Target
Unlimited cash back on select streaming services
Unlimited cash back on all other purchases

sources.notes: Official Capital One Savor page confirming public limited-time $250 cash bonus after $500 spend in 3 months, $0 annual fee, and core cash-back categories. No explicit end date visible on 2026-06-11.
Secondary source corroborating the limited-time $250 cash bonus after $500 spend in the first 3 months.
